scripts.build:github: bash scripts/with-zshrc-env.sh bash -c 'node scripts/check-node.mjs && VITE_BASE_PATH=/ vite build'
scripts.build:github-subpath: bash scripts/with-zshrc-env.sh bash -c 'node scripts/check-node.mjs && VITE_BASE_PATH=/cdn_webpage/ vite build'
scripts.preview:github-subpath: npm run build:github-subpath && bash scripts/with-zshrc-env.sh vite preview --base /cdn_webpage/
scripts.pages:to-docs: npm run build:github-subpath && bash scripts/with-zshrc-env.sh node scripts/sync-dist-to-repo-docs.mjs
